textByHash.46aad6aeb621cd930c728d06d3c726b01b8d3971: Get away from me, you foul commoner!
textByHash.21f8851f83f2cac8257c4e728ad43d50e20245bd: I don't believe him, Awowogei. Never trust a northern monkey.
textByHash.7ff97e0246874a817c4766da9772aba15209ce9e: I'm afraid all of our messengers are busy.
textByHash.7757ed24fc85fb797cac014a566cae42a3170e16: I'm afraid your time with the king is up, you should fetch Kruk from his post on the gate.
textByHash.3b79054a98db75b76ccfbea564d71bcfb61100a6: You are not welcome here, Kruk.
